Transaction type: Proposed acquisition of a controlling interest in the Target via a scheme of arrangement or share purchase agreement (to be elected), governed by Singapore law.

must_detect.matched_text:
Parties: Asterline Holdings Ltd. (LCX-SG: AHL0) as Offeror; Novalux Robotics Ltd. (LCX-SG: NVX0) as Target; arrangement vehicle: Orion Acquisition Pte. Ltd., all Singapore-incorporated.
Transaction type: Proposed acquisition of a controlling interest in the Target via a scheme of arrangement or share purchase agreement (to be elected), governed by Singapore law.
Consideration: Combination of cash and new Offeror shares; exact mix and any ratios to be determined following independent valuation and a fairness opinion; no price guidance is provided herein.
Conditions precedent: Regulatory approvals from the Urban Markets Authority (Singapore) and the Lion City Exchange Mainboard under LCX Listing Manual Rules 703-SG and 704-SG equivalents; Offeror and Target shareholder approvals; absence of material adverse effect.
Public information reference: This term sheet builds on the Offeror’s generally available LCXNet notices dated 12 Jun 2023 (strategic review commencement) and 15 Jan 2024 (update on options), which are stale and remain accessible.
Confidentiality/inside information: The parties have reached an in-principle, non-public understanding on key commercial terms, with signing targeted within 15 business days subject to final board approvals, and no LCXNet announcement has yet been made.
Disclosure timing: Upon execution of definitive agreements, the Offeror will release an announcement on LCXNet promptly, and in any case within the timeframe contemplated by LCX Listing Manual Rule 703-SG for material information.
Blackout/compliance: Each issuer will observe its closed-window policy (two weeks before quarterly results and one month before full-year results), and there will be no selective disclosure outside of LCXNet announcements.
Employee matters/PDPA: No personal data other than business contact information will be shared pre-signing; employee data for diligence will be aggregated or pseudonymised in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (Singapore).
Financing: Funding sources are expected to include committed bank facilities and internal resources; no firm amounts, pricing, or leverage ratios are set out in this document.
